title: File:Mobility Hub Berlin Südkreuz.jpg
alt: Mobility Hub at Berlin Sudkreuz with shared scooters, bikes, mopeds and Jelbi signage
caption: Caption: A good Berlin mobility decision starts with the map layer, then adds a bike, scooter, taxi or car only when it helps.
rationale: Strongest cover signal because it shows a real Berlin mobility hub with scooters, bikes, mopeds and the integrated Jelbi layer in one readable frame.
creator: SupapleX

title: File:Miles Audi A4, Berlin (20251221-P1074715).jpg
alt: MILES car sharing Audi A4 parked in Berlin Charlottenburg
caption: Caption: MILES is useful when a car solves a real car problem. For central sightseeing, it usually creates more work than it removes.
rationale: Current 2025 Berlin car-sharing image with clear MILES relevance and strong visual specificity.
creator: Matti Blume

title: File:E-Scooter Hermannstrasse.jpg
alt: Shared e-scooters parked on Hermannstrasse in Berlin Neukolln
caption: Caption: Scooters are only a good Berlin answer when the route is short, legal, dry and luggage-free.
rationale: Shows real parked e-scooters in Berlin, useful for the rules and parking part of the article.
creator: Jörg Fuhrmann (Intermerker)

title: File:Nextbike in Berlin (2023).jpg
role: inline image after bike sharing section
alt: Nextbike rental bicycle in Berlin in 2023
caption: Caption: On a dry day, a rental bike often turns a transfer into part of the Berlin experience.
rationale: Clean, recent Berlin bike-sharing visual that supports the e-bike/bike section without generic stock-photo energy.
creator: JoachimKohler-HB
